description: Flat vs contoured angle-beam wedge on a pipe OD. Left: flat shoe tangent at one line on the crest, hatched air gaps under heel and toe, weak fading refracted beam, rocking arc-arrows with fore/aft ghost exit points and ghosted refracted angles, heel-gap callout 0.5 mm (0.020 in.) MAX. Right (dim until final reveal): same wedge contoured to the pipe radius lights up with even couplant film band, bright solid beam, pinned exit-point marker.
